snippet.title: Singapore leadership succession: Heng Swee Keat explains why he is stepping down as 4G team leader
snippet.description:
Singapore Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat will step aside as the leader of the fourth-generation People's Action Party (PAP) leadership team, taking himself out of running as Singapore's next prime minister, he announced on Thursday (Apr 8).

Noting that he would be in his mid-60s by the time the COVID-19 crisis is over, Mr Heng said: "While I am in good health today, it is in the best interests of the nation for someone who is younger to tackle the huge challenges ahead." https://cna.asia/3wLKhJJ

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Arsenal vs Liverpool (0-3) | Premier League
snippet.description:
We slumped to a second consecutive defeat at the Emirates, and in truth can have few complaints about the result.

Champions Liverpool put us under pressure for most of the 90 minutes, while up front it was a frustrating evening for our forwards, who had very little to work with all game.

We held the visitors at bay for the first half, but once Diogo Jota was brought on, Liverpool moved up a gear and ran out comfortable winners.

It was a scrappy opening 15 minutes from both sides, before Liverpool slowly began to force us deeper and deeper into our own territory.

In fact we were struggling to get out of our own half at times, and the visitors really should have taken the lead when Trent Alexander-Arnold cut the ball back to the unmarked James Milner, but his first-time effort was off target.

The first-half stats did not look pretty for us. We managed just one shot compared to Liverpool's six, while the visitors enjoyed twice as much possession as us in the opening 45 minutes. To make matters worse we lost Kieran Tierney to injury just before the break.

Tierney's replacement, Cedric, had our first effort on target of the match, forcing a diving save from Alisson after being set up by Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang.

But the general flow of play remained towards our own goal, and Liverpool eventually took the lead through substitute Jota. His powerful header was too hot for Bernd Leno to handle after meeting Trent Alexander-Arnold's cross.

Five minutes later Mohamed Salah doubled the lead when he threaded the ball through Leno's legs at the near post.

We were architects of our own downfall for the third goal. Gabriel gave the ball away when playing out from the back, Liverpool worked it back into our box for Jota to gratefully tuck home his second.

The result leaves us stranded in ninth place, as attention once again turns to the Europa League this midweek.

#arsenal #premierleague #liverpool

Enjoy match highlights, training and behind the scenes to get closer to the likes of Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, David Luiz, Vivianne Miedema, Nicolas Pepe, Alexandre Lacazette, Leah Williamson, Bernd Leno, Danielle van de Donk, Willian, Hector Bellerin, Jordan Nobbs, Bukayo Saka, Kim Little, Gabriel Martinelli, Thomas Partey and more.

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. It’s both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. It’s a vicious cycle.

ـــــ
DW Documentary gives you knowledge beyond the headlines. Watch top documentaries from German broadcasters and international production companies. Meet intriguing people, travel to distant lands, get a look behind the complexities of daily life and build a deeper understanding of current affairs and global events. snippet.title: Singapore GrabFood rider jumps on customer's trampoline in viral video
snippet.description:
GrabFood delivery rider Sharil Berlandier jumped at the opportunity to bounce on a trampoline at a customer's house in the middle of a stressful day of work. His video of the moment, taken using a GoPro camera mounted on his motorcycle helmet, has since gone viral on TikTok.

snippet.title: MOFA: BBC is not trusted even in the UK
snippet.description:
For  more:
https://news.cgtn.com/news/2021-04-01/MOFA-BBC-is-not-trusted-even-in-the-UK--Z6u03TYwDu/index.html 

According to material openly available, BBC World Service is immune from any form of regulation and can produce all the disinformation it likes with legal impunity in the UK. It has caused the spread of the fake news virus not only in the UK but all over the world. BBC should try to do more just and truthful reports to tackle its credibility crisis, Chinese Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Hua Chunying said on Wednesday.

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. I’ve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But it’s wonderful to see that you’re okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesn’t look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess you’re all the same
Because I hear he’s got his arm ‘round a brand new girl
I’ve been picking up my heart
He’s been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But it’s wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It’s the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he’s so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it’s really such a shame
It’s such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I’m Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you’ll miss me
But by then you’ll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery for the last time
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine
You’re perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

I’ve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesn’t look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess you’re all the same
Because I hear he’s got his arm ‘round a brand new girl
I’ve been picking up my heart
He’s been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But it’s wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It’s the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he’s so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it’s really such a shame
It’s such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I’m Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you’ll miss me
But by then you’ll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery for the last time
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine
You’re perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

snippet.title: Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers | 用绢花工艺做了套桃花发冠，带上爱人浪了一把春天丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

最近跟去年过完年一样，搁家里忙春种来着。
因为想自己做发饰拍照所以有了这个视频
用真丝布料做了些“绢花”工艺的汉服饰品
趁着春色正好，桃花漫山
带上老人家去她一直想去的地方做作的浪了浪
了了念想
As a spring ritual after the new year, I’ve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.
-----------------------------------------------

ja.title: 絹で桃花の冠を作りました｜李子柒 丨Liziqi Channel
ja.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

最近跟去年过完年一样，搁家里忙春种来着。
因为想自己做发饰拍照所以有了这个视频
用真丝布料做了些“绢花”工艺的汉服饰品
趁着春色正好，桃花漫山
带上老人家去她一直想去的地方做作的浪了浪
了了念想

最近は去年と同じ、私は正月の後は春まきに忙しいです。
自分の手作りの髪飾りを被って写真を撮りたいから、この動画をしました。
シルク生地を使っで、漢服の飾りを「絹花」で作りました。
このかわいらしい春に、桃の花が山を染めるとき、
大切な人と一緒に、彼女がずっと見たい場所に行きました。
彼女のウィッシュリストをどんどん叶いましょう。

Haz una corona de melocotón con flores de seda y disfruta de la brisa primaveral con mi querida abuela

最近跟去年过完年一样，搁家里忙春种来着。

Como ritual de primavera después del año nuevo, he estado sembrando recientemente en casa.
Tomé este video porque quería hacer accesorios para el cabello a mano,
Hice estos adornos de Hanfu con flores de seda e hice este video.
En esta hermosa primavera, cuando las flores de durazno tiñen la montaña,
lleva a mi querida señora al lugar lleno de memoria, donde todo se encuentra,

zh-CN.title: Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers | 用绢花工艺做了套桃花发冠，带上爱人浪了一把春天丨Liziqi Channel
zh-CN.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

最近跟去年过完年一样，搁家里忙春种来着。
因为想自己做发饰拍照所以有了这个视频
用真丝布料做了些“绢花”工艺的汉服饰品
趁着春色正好，桃花漫山
带上老人家去她一直想去的地方做作的浪了浪
了了念想
As a spring ritual after the new year, I’ve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.

snippet.title: Chan Chun Sing on whether he is next in line to be Singapore's prime minister
snippet.description:
With DPM Heng Swee Keat having taken himself out of the running as Singapore's prime minister, his deputy, Chan Chun Sing, was asked if he was next in line.

"Now that DPM has decided to step aside as leader of the 4G, the 4G team should be given the opportunity to relook the question of succession holistically, and we will make a collective decision on who will be the next leader of the 4G in due course," Mr Chan said in response. https://cna.asia/3uvIZAq

snippet.title: EVERTON 1-1 CRYSTAL PALACE | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
James Rodriguez scored on his return to action to put Everton ahead against Crystal Palace, but the Blues were made to pay for missed chances as Michy Batshuayi levelled late on. The game also saw the return of Jean-Philippe Gbamin, who has been sidelined with injury for 597 days.

A man was found stuck in a drain - with water up to his chest - at a hiking trail along the Bukit Timah Expressway near Mandai Road on Sunday (March 21). https://str.sg/J9gL

He was later pulled out by officers from the Disaster Assistance and Rescue Team using rescue ropes, said the Singapore Civil Defence Force's (SCDF).

snippet.title: HARI BAHHAGIA - ATTA Halilintar & AUREL Hermansyah - ( OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Listen Hari Bahhagia : 
https://lnk.to/HariBahhagia​

*
Di sela kesibukannya meyiapkan hari pernikahan, Atta Halilintar dan Aurel Hermansyah membuat kejutan dengan single terbaru mereka berjudul HARI BAHHAGIA. Lagu yang terinspirasi dari kisah perjalanan mereka mulai dari masa bahagia, hingga masa sulit tertuang dalam lagu tersebut.

 “Aku kepengin banget menceritakan kisah cinta ini untuk Aurel. Dan kayaknya menyampaikan lewat lagu sudah pas sekali. Awalnya, ini lagu hanya dari aku untuk Aurel, bukan direncanakan untuk duet,” jelas Atta.

 Memang benar. Awal mula single ini hanyalah ungkapan perasaan bahagia dan syukur Atta, karena akan bersama Aurel dalam ikatan pernikahan. Dan ini tadinya merupakan kado rahasia yang disiapkan Atta untuk Aurel. Ketika Atta memberikan lagu itu untuk Aurel untuk di dengarkan, ia pun ingin berduet menyanyikannya bareng dengan Atta. Alhasil, lagu yang sudah jadi pun dirombak sebagai lagu duet.

*
Credit Music :
Song Producer : Atta Halilintar
Song composer : Atta Halilintar & Gibran Prio Adihutomo
Aranger : Achmad Maulana
Music & Lyric : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo
Vocal Directed by : Gibran Prio Adihutomo
Vocal Recorded at : Atta Music Studio
Vocal Audio Angineered by : Achmad Maulana
Mixed & Mastered : Achmad Maulana

*
Credit Music Video : 
Executive Producer : Atta Halilintar
Produced by : Satria Kinayungan
Directed by : Upie Guava
Co-Director by : Tb Elvan
Edited by : Upie Guava, Tb Elvan
Gaffer by : Wan Black

*
Outfits: Valentino, Marks and Spencer, Julianto, SAS designs
Accessories: Rinaldy Yunardi
Fashion Stylist: Erich Al Amin

snippet.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk “Bismillah Cinta” yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu “Hampa Hatiku” (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

“Bismillah Cinta” ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

“Lagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga “Bismillah Cinta” bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,” ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

“Semua orang bisa menyanyikan “Bismillah Cinta” dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan “Bismillah Cinta”, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan “Bismillah Cinta”, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,” kata Lesti. 

“Dalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul “Bismillah Cinta” produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi “Bismillah Cinta” ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series “Bismillah Cinta” yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, “Bismillah Cinta” menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,” jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

“Kolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan “Bismillah Cinta”,” ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

《乘风破浪的姐姐》是芒果TV推出的女团成长综艺节目，与其他女团选秀不同，该节目召集了30位1990年之前出生的女艺人，并最终选出7位成员组成女团。在第二季节目中，大众评审按照年龄分为30+和30-两大阵营。赛制上也变得更加残酷，初舞台表演要有Vocal（唱）和Dance（跳）两项，两项分开表演且缺一不可。节目焦点从女性的精彩绽放渗透到她们成功背后付出的努力和奋斗，表现出丰富多样化的女性价值观，诠释自信奋斗的“她力量”，让更多女性能从中感受到自我价值的体现。

《乘风破浪的姐姐》是芒果TV推出的女团成长综艺节目，与其他女团选秀不同，该节目召集了30位1990年之前出生的女艺人，并最终选出7位成员组成女团。在第二季节目中，大众评审按照年龄分为30+和30-两大阵营。赛制上也变得更加残酷，初舞台表演要有Vocal（唱）和Dance（跳）两项，两项分开表演且缺一不可。节目焦点从女性的精彩绽放渗透到她们成功背后付出的努力和奋斗，表现出丰富多样化的女性价值观，诠释自信奋斗的“她力量”，让更多女性能从中感受到自我价值的体现。

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜ 競馬Fact Check Live 2021-04-08直播九場HKJC香港賽馬會快活谷草地夜馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬 | 蘋果日報 Apple Daily
snippet.description:
跑馬地馬場今晚（8日）上演九場賽事，頭場定於傍晚6時45分開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

主持會分析此路人馬各駒機會，配合各場馬匹賽績、體重變化、人馬合作等統計資料，一表睇晒，方便刨馬。

《競馬Fact Check》今季新增AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，出閘預測走位圖畀觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬
。
《競馬Fact Check》亦有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於傍晚6時10分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》會全程直播。

蘋果日報 ： http://hk.apple.nextmedia.com
即 like 蘋果 fb  ： http://www.facebook.com/hk.nextmedia
iPhone App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-iPhone
Android App ： http://bit.ly/AppleDailyApp-Android

你的正常 我來發揮

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy – Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max – July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovie​
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/​
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/​
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event “Space Jam: A New Legacy,” from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.’s digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as you’ve never seen them before.  It’s Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBron’s bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even “King” James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the “Avengers” films, “Hotel Rwanda”), Khris Davis (“Judas and the Black Messiah,” TV’s “Atlanta”), Sonequa Martin-Green (TV’s “The Walking Dead,” “Star Trek: Discovery”), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (“Looney Tunes Cartoons”), Eric Bauza (“Looney Tunes Cartoons”), and Zendaya (upcoming “Dune,” “Malcolm & Marie”).

Lee (“Girls Trip,” “Night School”) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The film’s producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (“Spider-Man: Homecoming”), animation producer Troy Nethercott (“Wonder Park”), production designers Kevin Ishioka (“The Mule”), Akin McKenzie (Netflix’s “When They See Us”) and Clint Wallace (upcoming “Eternals”), editor Bob Ducsay (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Star Wars Episode VIII – The Last Jedi”) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (“Rampage,” “War for the Planet of the Apes”).  The music is by Kris Bowers (“Greenbook,” Netflix’s “Bridgerton”).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, “Space Jam: A New Legacy.”  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

Dream Warrior Pictures Proudly Presents the Video Song of “Jai Sulthan” From Karthi's #Sulthan, Directed By Bakkiyaraj Kannan. #Karthi | #RashmikaMandanna | #BakkiyarajKannan | #VivekMervin | #Anirudh  | #SRPrabhu | #DreamWarriorPictures

Song: Jai Sulthan
Music: VIVEK - MERVIN
Lyrics: Viveka
Singers: Anirudh Ravichander, Junior Nithya & Gana Guna

iTunes:https://music.apple.com/in/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan-single/1552701719?at=1l3v9Tx&uo=4&app=itunes

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/3t8eTRRkTRs9mxxYWZK9Xz

Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08W5C3LWC

Resso : https://m.resso.app/ZSJ19eWPk/

YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=VOw1RYZFU_Q&feature=share

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/jai-sulthan

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan/62168286/

Jio Saavn: https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/jai-sulthan-from-sulthan/cqF5r2p8hIA_

Wynk Music: https://wynk.in/u/j7ooonu7M

*பாடல் வரிகள்*

சண்டையில கீயாத 
சட்டையில்லா குமாரே

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா 
சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

ஹேய் …ஹேய் 
ஹேய் …ஹேய் 

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே .....
என் தெளலத்மாரே.... 
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என்  அண்ணன்மாரே ....

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே....
என் தெளலத்மாரே ....
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் 
என் அண்ணன்மாரே .....

ஏய் மத்தநாளு கிதான்றதே,சந்தேக கேசே ….
இங்க மன்ஷனுங்க ,எல்லாருமே  காமடி பீசே ...
நீ வாயகட்டி  வயத்தகட்டி ,சேக்காத காசே ...
சோறு துண்ணும்போது விக்கிச்சீனா 
எல்லாம் குளோசே ...

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா....

உனக்குன்னுதான் ,தரவா.. தரவா 
உசுர தரவா..
கலக்குறியே சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா …தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

ஏய்...தாதாமாரே,என் தெளலத்மாரே ...
அட அன்ப கொட்டும் ,என் அண்ணன்மாரே...


ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் ,ஹே குந்தல் 
ஹே நிக்கல் குந்தல்,
நிக்கல் குந்தல்
நிக்கலு  குந்தல்
நிக்கலு குந்தலு 

சபா டேய் ....
வயசாகுது  டா...
அய்யயோ …
அடங்கமாட்டீங்களா டா …

டேய்..
ஹே ஊரில் ரொம்ப பெரு 
மூஞ்ச உத்து பாரு ,
பூரான் உட்டு இருப்போம் 


மொரட்டு பீஸு …எல்லாம் ….
உருட்டு கட்டையால…
பொரட்டி …போட்டி …எடுப்போம் 
ஊய் ..சொக்கா மாட்டிகினு 
சோலி பாக்க …போனா 
தொக்க ஆல …புடிப்போம் 
பீடா போட்டமேறி …வாய கோயப்பிட்டு 
டாடா காட்டி …வருவோம் 

சம்பவம் செய்யும் வேலைய எல்லாம் 
அஞ்சாறு வாரம் ஒத்தி போடு ….
வம்புக்கு யாரும் வந்தாலும் கூட …
வள்ளலார் போல வணக்கம் போடு 

வா...சுல்தான் ,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 
உனக்குன்னுதான்,தரவா தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

வா...சுல்தான்,வா...சுல்தான்...
வா ...சுல்தான் ,வா ...சுல்தான் ...
வா.... 

உனக்குன்னுதான், தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...
தூக்கி சொல்லு….

வா சுல்தான் , வா சுல்தான் 
வா சுல்தான் ,வா ...

உனக்குன்னுதான் தரவா  தரவா 
உசுர தரவா...

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டு போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத, சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா ,சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே 

சண்டையில கீயாத ,சட்டையில்லா குமாரே
மண்டை ரெண்டா போவாட்டா, சண்டை ரொம்ப சுமாரே …

snippet.title: The Demons Baron Battled | Toni Talks
snippet.description: Talking to Baron made me reflect on my own life, the truth is, we all have done things in the past we are not proud of and we wouldn’t want to see in the headlines. But the beauty of his story is that no matter how many times you messed up your life, God will always love you and will never look at you the way others do.

snippet.title: Siti Nurhaliza Hadiahkan Lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU Buat Ernie Zakri & Syamel Walaupun Tengah Sarat
snippet.description:
Majlis resepsi Ernie Zakri dan Syamel sememangnya meriah dengan kehadiran rakan artis dan juga para peminat masing-masing yang sama-sama meraikan hari istimewa pasangan ini.

Selain daripada majlis yang sederhana namun terlihat eksklusif itu, kehadiran penyanyi nombor satu negera, Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang sudah sarat hamil anak kedua juga cukup membuatkan ramai ‘histeria’.

Beliau yang hadir bersama suami tercinta, Datuk Seri Khalid Mohd Jiwa dilihat mengenakan busana bewarna merah jambu telah berdiri dan spontan menyanyikan lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU hadiah buat pasangan pengantin. 

Walaupun usia kandungan sudah menghampiri sembilan bulan, suara Tok Ti masih lagi power dan mendapat sorakan daripada semua yang hadir.

Dapat dilihat wajah gembira pasangan Ernie Zakri dan Syamel yang begitu teruja ‘dihadiahkan’ dendangan lagu yang cukup istimewa buat penyanyi kesayangan ramai itu.

Menerusi media sosial, baik di Twitter ataupun di TikTok, kesemuanya memuji penampilan Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang begitu humble dan masih power menyampaikan lagu walaupun sedang sarat hamil anak kedua. #SITINURHALIZA #SYAMELERNIE

snippet.title: We Moved Across The Country
snippet.description:
You can check out our new live streaming channel here! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCiiY0MsUgNihfAZ2ZgC19lg

Hello friends and welcome to another video! So, late last year we decided to take the plunge and move across the country for a fresh start in a new place. After doing some serious decluttering, we packed up our house, grabbed our cat, and hit the road (and vlogged our whole cross-country road trip in our minivan!) It's been a couple of months and we are finally set up enough to dive back into making videos, so here is our moving vlog! Hopefully you guys enjoy it, and thank you for being so patient with us while we figure all of this out. 

Also, sorry about any smudginess of the windshield! It was tough to keep clean on our drive, but I know sometimes it can look gross, so sorry about that! Lol

This video is NOT sponsored!!

You can check out my Instagram here! https://www.instagram.com/safiyany/​

MUSIC
Via AudioNetwork

snippet.title: Tiger Mums And Asian Parent Things - Real Talk Season 2 Episode 19 (ft. Annette Lee)
snippet.description:
What were some common Asian things that your parents did to discipline you?

In this episode, the cast sits down with special guest Annette Lee to talk about the crazy ways we were brought up by our parents and the kind of parents we think we will be.

snippet.title: England 2-1 Poland | Maguire Volleys In Late Winner! | World Cup 2022 Qualifiers | Highlights
snippet.description:
A late goal from Harry Maguire helped the Three Lions beat Poland in their World Cup qualifier at Wembley Stadium. Harry Kane had given England the lead from the penalty spot in the first half, before Jakub Moder equalised for Poland.

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico — go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz — this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful — please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive — https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive — https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. — https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. — https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster — https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. — https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. — https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon — https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. — https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. — https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. — https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. — https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. — https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton — https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

en.title: The Secret of Synchronization
en.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico — go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz — this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful — please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive — https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive — https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. — https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. — https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. — https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster — https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. — https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. — https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon — https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. — https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. — https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. — https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. — https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

snippet.title: 白棉花为何上了“黑名单” | CCTV「焦点访谈」20210327
snippet.description:
本期节目主要内容：近期，H&M、Nike等一些国外品牌公司声称新疆存在“强迫劳动”问题，拒绝使用新疆棉花产品的声明，引起了全球舆论的关注。而前段时间记者接到一些新疆棉企负责人的反映，说去年以来已经签好的棉产品出口订单，突然间全部被取消，企业经营出现了一定问题。除了工人们担心自己会失去工作，就连棉农也开始担心自己种植的棉花会不会受到影响。

《焦点访谈》是以深度报道为主、以舆论监督见长的电视新闻评论性栏目。

zh-Hant.description:
本期節目主要內容：近期，H&M、Nike等一些國外品牌公司聲稱新疆存在“强迫勞動”問題，拒绝使用新疆棉花産品的聲明，引起了全球輿論的關注。而前段時間記者接到一些新疆棉企負責人的反映，説去年以來已經簽好的棉産品出口訂單，突然間全部被取消，企業經營出現了一定問題。除了工人們擔心自己會失去工作，就連棉農也開始擔心自己種植的棉花會不會受到影響。

《焦點訪談》是以深度報道爲主、以輿論監督見長的電視新聞評論性欄目。

Narasimha(Balakrishna) along with his just-born son moves to Kumbakonam and starts working as a driver. There, he comes across a corrupt cop and keeps fighting with him time and again. During one of the key problems involving the cop, Narasimha suddenly finds out that the cop’s wife is none other than his ex-girlfriend Gauri(Nayanthara). Who is this Narasimha? Why did he come to Kumbakonam? What is his backstory with Gauri?

snippet.title: 🔴 [Live in HD] ONE On TNT I
snippet.description:
The biggest month in ONE Championship history begins on Thursday, 8 April, as ONE on TNT I airs LIVE right here on YouTube at 8:30 a.m. SGT (some regions excluded).

In the main event, reigning ONE Flyweight World Champion Adriano Moraes defends his belt against all-time great Demetrious Johnson in the biggest flyweight mixed martial arts fight in history! 

In the co-main event, American legend Eddie Alvarez takes on dangerous #2-ranked contender Iuri Lapicus in a pivotal lightweight mixed martial arts showdown!

They are joined on this stacked card by Muay Thai superstar Rodtang Jitmuangnon, Senegalese wrestling sensation "Reug Reug," American warrior Tyler McGuire, and more!

MAIN CARD:

Catchweight Muay Thai (61.5kg)
Rodtang Jitmuangnon vs. Danial Williams

Flyweight World Championship
Adriano Moraes vs. Demetrious Johnson
 
Lightweight Mixed Martial Arts
Eddie Alvarez vs. Iuri Lapicus

LEAD CARD:

Welterweight Mixed Martial Arts
Tyler McGuire vs. Raimond Magomedaliev

Featherweight Kickboxing
Enriko Kehl vs. Chingiz Allazov

Heavyweight Mixed Martial Arts
Reug Reug vs. Patrick Schmid

Watch ONE on TNT I LIVE on 7 April:
10pm ET/10pm PT on TNT
10pm ET/7pm PT on TNT app
8:30pm ET/5:30pm PT on @Bleacher Report Live   
Check your local listings: http://bit.ly/HowToWatchONEonTNT

#ONEonTNT #ONEChampionship

snippet.title: 【愚人節特別企劃】2021.04.01《凹嗚狼人殺》黃偉晉、陳零九│邱鋒澤、婁峻碩、賴晏駒、逸祥、雨婷、紀卜心、篠崎泫、薔薔
snippet.description:
逸祥聖經大戰薔薔走宮廟視角+惡靈騎士局
狼隊配置：惡靈騎士+狼王+小狼
神隊配置：預+女+獵+騎
※女巫全程不可以自救
※此板子修改規則：狼王可以自爆帶人。

娛百版惡靈騎士規則：
1.惡靈騎士擁有「一次」反傷技能-在夜晚中被預言家查驗、被女巫下毒，則該神職淘汰。
2.惡靈騎士將永遠不會死於夜晚。
3.若夜晚中女巫與預言家同毒同驗惡靈騎士，則是女巫淘汰(因夜晚順序為女巫在先)。
4.獵人若死於夜晚，開槍到惡靈騎士，將無法帶走惡靈騎士，但若獵人在白天出局則可帶走惡靈騎士。
5.騎士白天驗證惡靈騎士身分，可成功將惡靈騎士淘汰，不會被反傷影響。
6.惡靈騎士不能自爆，不能自刀。
7.遺言比照先前規則，晚上死的只有第一晚淘汰者的有遺言。

snippet.title: 娛樂新聞台｜廖啟智｜不敵胃癌離世 ｜終年67歲 ｜家人於醫院陪伴走最後一程｜抗癌｜陳敏兒
snippet.description:
【娛樂新聞台】廖啟智不敵胃癌離世 終年67歲 家人於醫院陪伴走最後一程

我們所愛嘅智叔廖啟智昨晚3月28日不幸離世終年67歲，太太陳敏兒同埋兩位兒子都喺醫院陪伴佢走最後一程。早前3月23日智叔太太陳敏兒曾經係醫院交待智叔嘅病情，同時希望大家唔好打電話俾佢，俾佢安心靜養。事隔數日之後，就傳來噩耗非常令人婉惜。曾奪兩屆香港電影金像獎最佳男配角，演技實力超群，廣受圈中眾人愛戴，謝謝智叔帶俾我們無數嘅精彩演藝作品。

#娛樂新聞台 #廖啟智 #胃癌 #離世 #抗癌 #智叔 #香港演員 #港星

會員限定內容盡在會員專區:

snippet.description:

還沒學會BiuBiuBiu舞的同學們快點學起來一起跳😆😆😆

《超能力》
作曲：G.E.M.鄧紫棋
作詞：G.E.M.鄧紫棋

還沒完全離去
也許  是在等個結局
Yeah 但故事再延續  
你演了場 滑稽的喜劇

要忘掉一個人
也許  心裏要帶點怨恨
例如發現你  沒多單純
我卻有多愚蠢

這會不會是你唯一的謊言
不可能  不可能
這只不過是我第一次發現
你的謊  有多漂亮

你是否有超能力  
說謊才能全部都不留痕跡  不可思議
原來你的超能力
瞬間能夠崩塌我所有回憶  我討厭你

Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu 
噢我好想代替月亮消滅你  我討厭你
Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu Biu
噢你的偽裝實在無人能及  天下無敵

Shhhhhh  關閉嘴巴 
就讓假亦真時真亦假
你的笑話  我無法消化
Badaboom  原地爆炸
你炸到我心碎成了煙花
（My God）那讓我苦中作樂吧

噢你的偽裝實在無人能及  天下無敵

我從未想過有一天
會感覺不認識你
你神奇得就像世界第八個奇跡

snippet.title: $100 South Indian Food - GIANT 19 ITEMS THALI | Chettinad (Tamil Nadu) Crab Curry!
snippet.description:
🎥 Golden Crab Yolk - Thai Seafood Meal: https://youtu.be/T_5ctDxhhXM
📍 Sri Ananda Bhawan Bangkok: https://g.page/srianandabhawanbkk?share
👕 T-shirts and caps available now: https://migrationology.com/store/

BANGKOK, THAILAND - Welcome to Sri Ananda Bhawan, one of the best South Indian food restaurants in Bangkok that specializes in food from Chettinad in Tamil Nadu, South India. Today, we’re going to eat the giant 3,000 THB (around $100) banana leaf thali, that includes 19 different dishes! #IndianFood #Bangkok #Thailand

Chettinad is within the Tamil Nadu state of South India. The food is characterized by lots of chili powder, pepper, and curry leaves. When I heard about the massive 19 item thali, there was no way I could resist. Thanks to Sri Ananda Bhawan and Mr. Rachan, for allowing me to see inside the kitchen as the talented Chef’s prepared all 19 dishes. One of their most well known dishes is the Chettinad crab curry. Onions, tomatoes, garlic, curry leaves, chili powder, pepper, coriander, all tempered down, loaded with crab, Chettinad masala, and coconut milk. The result was something truly spectacular, a combination of spices and ingredients that any curry lover will fall in love with.

Along with the Chettinad crab curry there was chicken 65, fish 65, prawn 65, about three other prawn dishes, 2 mutton dishes, fish masala, tandoori fish, a variety of veg dishes, chicken curries, sambar, and rasam. All laid out on a banana leaf with rice, it was truly a special meal!

I would also mention that although I ordered the massive 19 item thali, which you have to actually pre-order (and I would highly recommend). You can additionally just walk in, and they have many other more simple thalis that you can order - including vegetarian, or just order single dishes. Amazing South Indian food, and specifically one of the only Chettinad restaurants in Bangkok, Thailand.

📍 Sri Ananda Bhawan Restaurant, Bangkok: https://g.page/srianandabhawanbkk?share

Thank you very much for watching this video, and hope you’re having a fantastic day!

🎵MUSIC: 
https://goo.gl/HwVjdo

A Wei est soudainement rentré chez lui et a été interrogé par des internautes. Que s'est-il passé? Yanzi a expliqué la cause de l'incident.
#Awei Swallows#Visite autonome#Violence sur Internet#VR
Awei est rentré à la maison et a été interrogé. Yanzi a répondu positivement à l'incident. Seul soi-même connaissait la tristesse derrière [Awei Swallow's Travel]
Une voiture, deux personnes côte à côte, allant dans une ville

Faites-le simplement parce que vous l'aimez, pour ne pas avoir de regrets

Salut! Nous sommes Awei et Yanzi, un jeune couple qui aime voyager en voiture. Dans l'attente de votre participation à l'avenir, cherchons côte à côte notre vraie personnalité pendant le voyage.

ta.title: Awei வீட்டிற்கு வந்து விசாரிக்கப்பட்டார், யான்சி இந்த சம்பவத்திற்கு சாதகமாக பதிலளித்தார்
ta.description:
ஆர்.வி டூர் ▶▶ https: //aweiyanzilvxingji.page.link/ZCg5
Awei Swallow & Big Head Small Head ▶▶ https: //aweiyanzilvxingji.page.link/85EH
வடகிழக்கு பயணம் ▶▶ https: //aweiyanzilvxingji.page.link/Ak1i
திபெத்தில் காரில் பயணம் ▶▶ https: //aweiyanzilvxingji.page.link/moke
எங்கள் பயண நேர இயந்திரத்தை உள்ளிட இங்கே கிளிக் செய்க ☟☟☟ 『https://aweiyanzilvxingji.page.link/naxz
ஒரு வீ திடீரென வீட்டிற்குச் சென்று நெட்டிசன்களால் விசாரிக்கப்பட்டார். என்ன நடந்தது? சம்பவத்தின் காரணத்தை யான்சி கூறினார்.
#Awei Swallows#Self-driving Tour#Internet Violence#RV
Awei வீட்டிற்கு வந்து விசாரிக்கப்பட்டார். இந்த சம்பவத்திற்கு யான்சி சாதகமாக பதிலளித்தார். [Awei Swallow's Travel] பின்னால் உள்ள சோகத்தை தனக்கு மட்டுமே தெரியும்.
ஒரு கார், இரண்டு பேர் அருகருகே, ஒரு நகரத்திற்குச் செல்கிறார்கள்

நீங்கள் விரும்பியதால் அதைச் செய்யுங்கள், இதனால் உங்களுக்கு எந்த வருத்தமும் இல்லை

வணக்கம்! நாங்கள் Awei மற்றும் Yanzi, ஒரு இளம் தம்பதியினர், அவர்கள் காரில் பயணம் செய்ய விரும்புகிறார்கள். எதிர்காலத்தில் உங்கள் பங்களிப்பை எதிர்பார்த்து, பயணத்தின் போது எங்கள் உண்மையான நபர்களை அருகருகே பார்ப்போம்.

後悔しないように、好きだからやってください

snippet.title: 【外交部】马来西亚外长用中文叫王毅“大哥” 华春莹说隔屏幕都感觉到热烈
snippet.description:
4月1日，王毅国务委员兼外长与马来西亚外长希沙姆丁共见记者时，希沙姆丁用中文表示，马来西亚和中国是一家人，王毅国委是我的兄长。现场气氛暖意融融。 对此，外交部发言人华春莹在2日例行记者会上回应称，希沙姆丁外长用中文表达自己的心声，我看到王毅国务委员向他竖起了大拇指，同时说，我们是兄弟。我想，这段很温暖的互动，让我们隔着屏幕都能感受到中马之间的友好和热烈，这也是中马全面战略伙伴关系的一个生动的写照。————Please subscribe to the SMG Official TV Channel! 欢迎订阅SMG上海电视台官方频道】
★东方卫视《环球交叉点》，上海广播电视台二十年打造的国际新闻优质品牌。
站内热门：
1、【白宫義见】白宫记者团百年来首位华文记者，零距离解读美国政治
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLAyEv1wrVt_PRnbIfUo7wT6Xpi8zNOSTK
2、【环球叶问】美女评论员章一叶，从政治学、社会学、传播学等视角，解读国际热点。
shorturl.at/orAFP
3、【砚青吃瓜】美女评论员陈砚青，以国际关系和新闻专业主义，高举吃瓜旗帜，解构国际热点故事
shorturl.at/mnpLP
4、【环球数说】美女评论员娄佳，带你看数字呈现的新闻，还有数字背后的新闻，有点儿意思
shorturl.at/uBD39
5、【东瀛一周蒋】资深媒体人蒋丰，在日本聊日本，“精致”解读日本政治生活
shorturl.at/xMSW0
6、【大咖说】中国顶尖国际关系学者的真知灼见。牛掰是有道理的
shorturl.at/tFL39
7、【交叉点评】追热点、涨知识，看了不后悔
shorturl.at/tER16
8、【环球交叉点】40分钟国际时政深度访谈，顶级水准、干货满满
shorturl.at/mBDVY
优质拍档：
【ShanghaiEye魔都眼】
The most interesting things you need to know about Shanghai and China
shorturl.at/mpv04

4月1日，王毅国务委员兼外长与马来西亚外长希沙姆丁共见记者时，希沙姆丁用中文表示，马来西亚和中国是一家人，王毅国委是我的兄长。现场气氛暖意融融。 对此，外交部发言人华春莹在2日例行记者会上回应称，希沙姆丁外长用中文表达自己的心声，我看到王毅国务委员向他竖起了大拇指，同时说，我们是兄弟。我想，这段很温暖的互动，让我们隔着屏幕都能感受到中马之间的友好和热烈，这也是中马全面战略伙伴关系的一个生动的写照。————Please subscribe to the SMG Official TV Channel! 欢迎订阅SMG上海电视台官方频道】
★东方卫视《环球交叉点》，上海广播电视台二十年打造的国际新闻优质品牌。
站内热门：
1、【白宫義见】白宫记者团百年来首位华文记者，零距离解读美国政治
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLAyEv1wrVt_PRnbIfUo7wT6Xpi8zNOSTK
2、【环球叶问】美女评论员章一叶，从政治学、社会学、传播学等视角，解读国际热点。
shorturl.at/orAFP
3、【砚青吃瓜】美女评论员陈砚青，以国际关系和新闻专业主义，高举吃瓜旗帜，解构国际热点故事
shorturl.at/mnpLP
4、【环球数说】美女评论员娄佳，带你看数字呈现的新闻，还有数字背后的新闻，有点儿意思
shorturl.at/uBD39
5、【东瀛一周蒋】资深媒体人蒋丰，在日本聊日本，“精致”解读日本政治生活
shorturl.at/xMSW0
6、【大咖说】中国顶尖国际关系学者的真知灼见。牛掰是有道理的
shorturl.at/tFL39
7、【交叉点评】追热点、涨知识，看了不后悔
shorturl.at/tER16
8、【环球交叉点】40分钟国际时政深度访谈，顶级水准、干货满满
shorturl.at/mBDVY

snippet.title: How Mercedes-Benz Is Losing Its Prestige Image
snippet.description:
Mercedes-Benz is perhaps the biggest name in luxury cars globally, and for countless buyers around the world, it is a car brand to aspire to own. The German automaker has a reputation for superb build quality, excellent engineering, and the bragging rights that its founder Carl Benz invented the first production automobile. 

Today, Mercedes-Benz faces a new class of challenges as Tesla has become the aspirational brand for younger consumers. There is a slew of other EV hopefuls vying for the next generation’s aspirational vehicle’s mantle. Automakers have had to sink billions into new technologies and contend with a new crop of competitors in the critical Chinese market and around the world.

snippet.title: Menjelang Ramadan | Dihalau tuan rumah, Steven Sim bantu ibu anak 10
snippet.description:
Menjelang Ramadan yang dijangka bakal membuka tirai 13 April ini, pastinya ramai umat Islam mula membuat persiapan meraikan bulan penuh keberkatan dan rahmat.

Namun, keceriaan menjelang ramadan itu tidak sama bagi seorang ibu beranak 10, apabila individu dikenali sebagai Ros itu dikatakan dihalau keluar dari rumah sewa kerana dikatakan tidak mampu membayar sewa.

snippet.title: 賽馬直播｜2021-04-05 競馬Fact Check Live直播十場HKJC香港賽馬會沙田草地日馬 即場貼士 AI模擬賽果 排隊馬 —蘋果日報 Apple Daily
snippet.description:
這天（5日）沙田馬場上演十場草地日賽，頭場定於下午1時正開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

《競馬Fact Check》提供AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，將有出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》設有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於中午12時25分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》都會全程直播。

蘋果日報 ： http://hk.apple.nextmedia.com

localized.description:
這天（5日）沙田馬場上演十場草地日賽，頭場定於下午1時正開跑。

蘋果《競馬Fact Check》屆時直播各場賽事，讓馬迷猶如置身場內睇跑馬。

《競馬Fact Check》提供AI模擬賽果，集各項data進行運算，識別出哪些是機會馬，以得分高低排序，一目了然！

主持亦會即場解答讀者留言，與讀者互動交流；另外會加插騎練賽前訪問，大家或者從中可以搵到方向。

此外，將有出閘預測走位圖，等觀眾了解今場賽事形勢，邊啲馬可以賺步速；邊啲馬相對蝕底，務求幫大家捉更多冷馬。

《競馬Fact Check》設有參賽馬賠率走勢，由隔晚到即場，一目了然；電腦預計臨場大戶落飛馬，讓馬迷落注前作參考，增添勝算。

《競馬Fact Check》將於中午12時25分開播，屆時Youtube及《果燃台》都會全程直播。

snippet.title: Baylor wins the 2021 NCAA basketball championship | extended highlights
snippet.description:
Baylor dominated from wire to wire to defeat Gonzaga and win the 2021 National Championship! The Bears won their first title in program history behind 22 points from Jared Butler and 19 from MaCio Teague. Watch the extended highlights here.

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

localized.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
localized.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

snippet.title: I'm Leaving Youtube
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Cast of Vincenzo opens up about what keeps them going in life | Couch Talk [ENG SUB]
snippet.description:
Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been, and Ok Taec-yeon sit down for a chat about what motivates them, and the feelings they shared while getting into character for VINCENZO. No surprise that their dynamic is as fun offscreen as it is on—they even establish themselves as honorary members of The Swoon Fan Club! 🥰

Subscribe to The Swoon: https://bit.ly/2IiIXqV

Follow The Swoon on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/theswoonnetflix/

Watch Vincenzo on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81365087


ABOUT THE SWOON

Welcome to The Swoon, your all-access pass behind the scenes of your favorite Korean and Asian dramas. Get up close and personal with the stars. Tell us what you love to watch, what endings made you want to tear your hair out, and what keeps you coming back for more, ever optimistic that the next one will be The One.

For the fans.
Powered by Netflix.
All biases welcome.

th.title: นักแสดงจาก Vincenzo เปิดใจเกี่ยวกับสิ่งที่ทำให้พวกเขาก้าวต่อไปในชีวิต | จับเข่าคุย [ซับไทย CC]
th.description: ซงจุงกิ จอนยอบีน และ อ๊กแทคยอน นั่งคุยกันเกี่ยวกับสิ่งที่กระตุ้นพวกเขาและความรู้สึกที่พวกเขาแบ่งปันในขณะที่มารับบทเป็นตัวละครใน VINCENZO ไม่แปลกใจเลยที่ปฏิสัมพันธ์นอกจอของพวกเขาจะสนุกเหมือนอยู่ในจอ - พวกเขาตั้งตัวเป็นสมาชิกกิตติมศักดิ์ของ แฟนคลับ The Swoon ด้วยซ้ำ! 🥰

pt.title: O elenco de Vincenzo fala abertamente sobre o que os faz seguir em frente na vida | Couch Talk [PT]
pt.description: Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been e Ok Taec-yeon sentam-se para bater um papo sobre o que os motiva na vida e sobre os sentimentos que compartilharam ao dar vida aos personagens de VINCENZO. Não é de se admirar que a dinâmica deles seja tão divertida fora da tela quanto dentro - eles até se instituem como membros honorários do The Swoon Fan Club! 🥰

zh-Hant.title: 黑道律師文森佐的主演們探討人生的意義 | 沙發座談【中字 CC】
zh-Hant.description: 宋仲基、全汝彬和玉澤演坐下來分享他們的動力還有進入角色的一些感想。这一点也不惊奇他们荧幕下和荧幕上的团队动力都一样有趣 — 还称自己为Swoon粉丝会的荣誉成员！🥰

id.title: Para pemeran Vincenzo menceritakan hal yang membuat mereka terus hidup | Obrolan Santai [INDO SUB]
id.description: Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been, dan Ok Taec-yeon duduk berbincang tentang apa yang memotivasi mereka, dan apa yang mereka rasakan saat mendalami peran di VINCENZO. Tak heran jika dinamika mereka di balik layar seseru saat di depan layar--mereka bahkan menyatakan kalau mereka adalah anggota terhormat Klub Penggemar The Swoon! 🥰

ja.title: 「ヴィンチェンツォ」のキャストが人生について語ります [日本語字幕付き]
ja.description: ソン・ジュンギ、チョン・ヨビンとオク・テギョンが一緒に人生に着いて語ります。人生で何がモチベーションになってるやドラマの役作りの準備の心境はどうだったについても語ります。この3人のケミストリーはオンスクリーンでもオフスクリーンでも抜群だと感じられるトークになります－THE SWOONのファンクラの名誉会員を自分たちに名付けましたよ！🥰

es.title: El elenco Vincenzo habla abiertamente sobre qué les hace seguir adelante en la vida | Couch Talk[ES]
es.description: Song Joong-ki, Jeon Yeo-been y Ok Taec-yeon se sientan a charlar sobre lo que les motiva en la vida y los sentimientos que compartieron al dar vida a los personajes de VINCENZO. No es de extrañar que su dinámica sea tan divertida fuera de la pantalla como dentro de ella: - ¡incluso se han establecido como miembros honorarios de The Swoon Fan Club! 🥰

snippet.title: ENGSUB【大章鱼 Big Octopus】深海巨兽基因变异重组！ | 动作/冒险/灾难 | YOUKU MOVIE | 优酷电影
snippet.description:
【大章鱼 Big Octopus】深海巨兽基因变异重组！ | 动作/冒险/灾难 | YOUKU MOVIE | 优酷电影
类型：动作 / 冒险 / 灾难
导演：项华祥
主演：刘牧 / 赵茜 / 张皓承 / 程玲 / 谢志顺 / 林斯耀 / 颜华山 / 许秀菁 / 林美芬 / 周雪婷

snippet.title: ROSÉ - 'On The Ground' M/V
snippet.description:
On The Ground

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
It’s funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your gold’s just plastic

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

My world’s been hectic seems electric
But I’ve been waking up with your voice in my head
And I’m trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute I’m without you I regret it

Every day every night
I’ve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me I’m never coming down
I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they don’t hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they don’t hear me though (You’re running out of time)

I’m way up in the clouds
And they say I’ve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though

On the ground
Nah but they don’t hear me though
Everything I need is on the ground

snippet.title: PESHAWARI CHAWAL | Pakistan Special Golden Pulao Recipe Cooking in Indian Village | Mutton Recipes
snippet.description:
The world has a lot of most tasty pulao recipes with different names like Chana Mewa Pulao, Zaiqa Chawal, and more. Today we cook Pakistan's special Beef Chana Mewa Pulao recipe using mutton instead of Beef.

We use Chana and Dry grapes as the main ingredients for this pulao recipe.

That taste is delicious!

snippet.title: Ripper - The Wanted Killer ft. @Karikku | Irul | Netflix India
snippet.description:
What happens when five friends decide to get together for a couple of drinks and risk a close encounter of the murderous kind?

A serial killer, crippling fear and paranoia: Are their fears misplaced, or are they warranted?

Find out how the night unfolds, and if you’re looking for another old-fashioned whodunit, catch Fahadh Faasil and Soubin Shahir in Irul, now streaming on Netflix.

Written & Directed by Nikhil Prasad
Cast: Anu K Aniyan, Arjun Ratan, Jeevan Stephen, Sabareesh Sajjin, Kiran Viyyath, Unni Mathews

DOP/Art: Sunil Karthikeyan
Edit: Anand Mathews
BGM and Sound Design: Charles Nazareth
Sound Engineer: Jishnu Ram
Poster Design: Binoy John
Associate Camera: Blessan K Mon
Colorist: Srik Varier 
DI Studio: Poetic prism and pixels studio
Production Coordinator: Biju Narayan
Production Assistants: Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu

Gaffer: Binu P Varghese
Assistant Camera: Renju Jose
Camera Rentals: Mega Focus
Camera Team: Jinesh Balan, Shaji KK, Chandhu

snippet.title: 专访考古专家雷雨，深度解读三星堆新发现 | CCTV「面对面」
snippet.description:
三星堆遗址新发现的6座“祭祀坑”，已出土了金面具残片、青铜神树、象牙等500余件文物。古老的三星堆遗址从发现到发掘历时漫长，新发现传递出怎样的秘密？

《面对面》是一档长篇人物专访节目，秉持新闻性、权威性、关注度、影响力的诉求，面对面的交流，心与心的碰撞，用对话记录历史，以人物解读新闻。

snippet.description:

為了讓[老人癡愛]能夠比較容易進入台灣KTV. 我們特地錄製了華語副版. 這首[單身狗]是網路上留言區灌爆要我錄的, 留言按讚那些應該都是一群單身狗…

數位音樂下載 Online Music Download【老人癡愛 Alzheimer's Love】：https://lnk.to/AlzheimersLove

Lyric Version【老人癡愛 Alzheimer’s Love】動態歌詞版 Youtube高清版 : https://youtu.be/QKr6wHftGxM

-

【老人癡愛-網路歌唱比賽】報名條件及方式

1. 參賽團體不限國籍，年齡，性別。
2. 參賽者必須演唱粵語原版的【老人癡愛】或華語版的【單身狗】其中一個。
3. 參賽者只需自行錄製唱歌影片（不能調音後製處理），再將影片上傳到Youtube。把連接和個人資料例如姓名，性別，年齡，來自哪裡，還有銀行賬戶寄到以下的email [artistemanage.nsp@gmail.com］即可。
4. 報名截止日期為2021年4月17日晚上11:59:59前。
5. 在5月以前，我們會將入圍的參賽影片公佈讓網民投票選出前三名優勝者。
6. 前三名優勝者均可獲得精美獎盃一座；另外，冠軍得主可以得到500塊美金，亞軍200美金，及季軍100美金的獎金。

-

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube ► https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Get the latest headlines: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/

snippet.title: 【SECOND STAGE】Hear the Story, ’You Better Not Think About Me‘~ 缓缓唱出男孩心底思绪，《你就不要想起我》 | 创造营 CHUANG2021
snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

《创造营2021》是由腾讯视频出品的国际青年文化交流男团成长综艺，致力于充分展现新时代国际青年人的音乐舞台表现力、青春活力和拼搏向上力。节目召集来自不同国家、不同经纪公司和院校的近百名学员，在多位榜样前辈的引领、助力、陪伴下一同进行文化与专业交流、打破重组迎接挑战，一同探索真我热血追梦。

snippet.title: The Heat: China pushes back on Western narrative on Xinjiang
snippet.description:
Western countries imposed sanctions on China in response to allegations of human rights’ abuses in its Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region.

Those allegations, reported by Western media outlets, claim the minority Uygur Muslim population is being subjected to forced labor and other abuses.

CGTN’s Huang Yue went to Xinjiang and filed this report.

To discuss:

Zoon Ahmed Khan is a Visiting Fellow at Tsinghua University.
Pepe Escobar is the editor-at-large for the Asia Times.
Dan Cohen is a correspondent for Behind The Headlines.
Han Peng is a CGTN Correspondent.

snippet.title: PM Lee on succession after DPM Heng Swee Keat takes himself out of the running for PM
snippet.description:
In a press conference on Thursday (April 8) to address Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat’s decision to step down as the frontman of the fourth-generation (4G) leadership, Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong said: “They (the 4G team) and I are very conscious that succession remains an urgent task and cannot be put off indefinitely.”

localized.title: PM Lee on succession after DPM Heng Swee Keat takes himself out of the running for PM
localized.description:
In a press conference on Thursday (April 8) to address Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat’s decision to step down as the frontman of the fourth-generation (4G) leadership, Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong said: “They (the 4G team) and I are very conscious that succession remains an urgent task and cannot be put off indefinitely.”

snippet.title: Try not to laugh CHALLENGE | Premier League edition
snippet.description:
Do you have what it takes to complete the Premier League try not to laugh challenge? Let us know how you get on in the comments!

This video features Steven Gerrard and a Chelsea mascot, Sir Alex Ferguson versus a balloon, a Louis van Gaal dive, David Dunn’s rabona fail, Steven Taylor’s best goalkeeper impression, Kevin De Bruyne hitting a corner flag and more!

บอกเลยว่าห้ามยิ้ม! คิดว่าจะทนกับชาเลนจ์ห้ามขำของพรีเมียร์ลีกไหวรึเปล่า? คอมเมนท์บอกผลหน่อยนะ!

พบกับ สตีเฟ่น เจอร์ราด กับมาสค็อตของ เชลซี, เซอร์ อเล็กซ์ เฟอร์กูสัน ปะทะลูกโป่ง, พุ่งสวยๆกับ หลุยส์ ฟาน กัล, ราโบน่าแบบเฟลๆจาก เดวิด ดันน์, การเลียนแบบผู้รักษาประตูของ สตีเฟ่น เทย์เลอร์, ความแม่นของ เควิน เดอ บรอยน์ และอีกเพียบ!

Subscribe to the official Premier League YouTube channel: http://preml.ge/PremierLeagueYouTube 
Premier League website: http://preml.ge/PremierLeagueWebsite
Follow the Premier League on Instagram: http://preml.ge/PremierLeagueInstagram
Follow the Premier League on Twitter: http://preml.ge/PremierLeagueTwitter
Like the Premier League on Facebook: http://preml.ge/PremierLeagueFacebook
Play Fantasy Premier League: http://preml.ge/FantasyPremierLeague
To license Premier League match footage: https://imgreplay.com/contact

#PremierLeague #Challenge #Football #Soccer #พรีเมียร์ลีก

Your safety online

Visit the Child Exploitation and Online Protection website for confidential support if something has happened online which has made you feel unsafe, if you are worried about someone else or to report online abuse. (https://www.ceop.police.uk/safety-centre)

You should contact the Police by calling 999 if you or anybody else is in any sort of danger.

Visit CEOP’s Thinkuknow website for advice and guidance on safe surfing and staying safe online for example when using mobile phones, blogs, social media, chatting, online gaming and emailing. (https://www.thinkuknow.co.uk)

You can also visit the Premier League safeguarding page for more information. (https://www.premierleague.com/safeguarding)

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Scar EAT Mufasa? (The Lion King)
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH    

Last time I talked about the Lion King, we were seeing just how big the body count was for this beloved Disney movie and sayong Scar was the rightful king. WEll, we are leaning into that even HARDER this time! Today, I want to talk about the sibling rivalry to end all sibling rivalries - Scar and Mufasa. Theorists, lions are a very, VERY interesting animal. I think that Scar ATE Mufasa after the stampede. You'll have to watch to find out WHY!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! ► https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! ► http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! 👀


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

Parent’s Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: 习近平在视察武警第二机动总队时强调 全面加强练兵备战 全面提高履行使命任务能力 | CCTV「新闻联播」20210326
snippet.description:
本期节目主要内容：
01:35 习近平在视察武警第二机动总队时强调 全面加强练兵备战 全面提高履行使命任务能力； 
08:29 习近平同喀麦隆总统就中喀建交50周年互致贺电； 
10:30 奋力谱写全面建设社会主义现代化国家福建篇章——习近平总书记在福建考察引起广大干部群众热烈反响； 
17:42 【央视快评】在服务和融入新发展格局上展现更大作为； 
17:51 李克强主持召开经济形势部分地方政府主要负责人视频座谈会； 
19:49 栗战书同巴西众议长举行会谈； 
21:41 全国政协召开网络议政远程协商会 围绕“全民义务植树行动的优化提升”协商议政； 
23:37 新华社通讯：让历史照亮未来——跟着习近平总书记的足迹学习党史； 
23:48 党史学习教育中央宣讲团报告会在新疆生产建设兵团、西藏、青海举行； 
26:12 国家航天局发布天问一号拍摄火星侧身影像； 
27:13 大型政论专题片《扫黑除恶——为了国泰民安》今起播出； 
29:09 按梯次推进 我国加快新冠疫苗接种； 
30:47 国内联播快讯： 
（1）2021年中央本级“三公”经费预算比去年下降6%； 
（2）24项政策措施培育新型消费； 
（3）三部门要求防止经营贷违规流入房地产领域； 
（4）新修订的《医疗器械监督管理条例》6月1日施行； 
（5）黄河流域入河排污口排查整治专项行动启动； 
（6）“双千兆”行动计划发布 三年建成百个千兆城市； 
（7）2021年军队直招军官工作启动； 
（8）“唱支心歌给党听”大型主题合唱活动今天启动； 
（9）市场监管总局责令492户营利性医疗机构更名； 
（10）最高法发布26条举措服务保障北京“两区”建设； 
（11）山海高速正式通车 海南实现“县县通高速”； 
（12）全国铁路4月10日实行新列车运行图； 
35:54 古特雷斯：必须解决种族主义遗毒 中国代表：美国应着力解决自身人权问题； 
38:27 国际联播快讯： 
（1）联合国报告：全球经济遇90年最严重衰退； 
（2）货船仍搁浅 苏伊士运河中止通航。

zh-Hant.title: 習近平在視察武警第二機動總隊時强調 全面加强練兵備戰 全面提高履行使命任務能力 | CCTV「新聞聯播」20210326
zh-Hant.description:
本期節目主要內容：
 01:35 習近平在視察武警第二機動總隊時强調 全面加强練兵備戰 全面提高履行使命任務能力；
08:29 習近平同喀麥隆總統就中喀建交50周年互致賀電；
10:30 奮力譜寫全面建設社會主義現代化國家福建篇章——習近平總書記在福建考察引起廣大幹部群衆熱烈反響；
17:42 【央視快評】在服務和融入新發展格局上展現更大作爲；
17:51 李克强主持召開經濟形勢部分地方政府主要負責人視頻座談會；
19:49 栗戰書同巴西衆議長舉行會談；
21:41 全國政協召開網絡議政遠程協商會 圍繞“全民義務植樹行動的優化提升”協商議政；
23:37 新華社通訊：讓歷史照亮未來——跟着習近平總書記的足跡學習黨史；
23:48 黨史學習教育中央宣講團報告會在新疆生產建設兵團、西藏、青海舉行；
26:12 國家航天局發布天問一號拍攝火星側身影像；
27:13 大型政論專題片《掃黑除惡——爲了國泰民安》今起播出；
29:09 按梯次推進 我國加快新冠疫苗接種；
30:47 國內聯播快訊：
（1）2021年中央本級“三公”經費預算比去年下降6%；
（2）24項政策措施培育新型消費；
（3）三部門要求防止經營貸違規流入房地產領域；
（4）新修訂的《醫療器械監督管理條例》6月1日施行；
（5）黃河流域入河排污口排查整治專項行動啟動；
（6）“雙千兆”行動計劃發布 三年建成百個千兆城市；
（7）2021年軍隊直招軍官工作啟動；
（8）“唱支心歌給黨聽”大型主題合唱活動今天啓動；
（9）市場監管總局責令492戶營利性醫療機構更名；
（10）最高法發布26條舉措服務保障北京“兩區”建設；
（11）山海高速正式通車 海南實現“縣縣通高速”；
（12）全國鐵路4月10日實行新列車運行圖；
35:54 古特雷斯：必須解决種族主義遺毒 中國代表：美國應着力解决自身人權問題；
38:27 國際聯播快訊：
（1）聯合國報告：全球經濟遇90年最嚴重衰退；

snippet.title: A 100 years old Legacy: Famous Eunos Bak Chor Mee - Food Stories
snippet.description:
Bak Chor Mee was founded by Mr Chen Lian Fu in the 1920s, served on a 2-basket-hawker. It has then became a significant meal choice for majority of the Singapore population. Growing up as a descendant of an almost 100 years old hawker trade, Jie Wei abandoned his corporate career to continue the legacy of Mr Chen Lian Fu, serving delicious soup and dry based Bak Chor Mee. Little did we know that most of the soup based Bak Chor Mee was descended from the same ""hero"". 

Address:
Famous Eunos Bak Chor Mee
7 Eunos Cres, Hong Lee Coffee Shop
Singapore 400007

Shot by: Hoo Yi, Priscilla, Shu En
Edited by: Solomon
--
Website: https://sethlui.com/famous-eunos-bak-chor-mee-singapore/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/sethluimarketing
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sethluicious/

#sethlui #foodstories #food #foodies #sgfoodies #eats #famouseunosbakchormee #bakchormee

snippet.title: Talachabi | তালাচাবি | New Natok 2021 | Afran Nisho | Mehazabien Chowdhury | Bangla Natok 2021
snippet.description:
Talachabi - New Natok 2021 - Tala Chabi Natok/ তালাচাবি নাটক, starring Afran Nisho & Mehazabien Chowdhury in lead roles, directed by Serniabat Shawon.

Talachabi Natok
[A Eagle Music Original Drama]

Story, Script & Directed by: Serniabat Shawon
Tala cabi Cast: Afran Nisho, Mehazabien Chowdhury, Kachi Khondoker, Shilpi sharkar Apu & Iktarul Islam.

তালা চাবি নাটক এর অন্যান্য চরিত্রেঃ আয়ান আহমীর সুজন, রাফায়াতুল্লা সোহান, উদয় খান, তাকবিরুল ইসলাম ও সুমগ্ন সৌরভ
Cinematographer: Zahid Hossain
Title, Edit & Color: Tanvir Tahsan
Background Score: Apple Mahmud Emil
Chief Ad: Rayhan Asad, Hasib Rahman
Ad: Rijuan Alom Akib,rajon Monrai
Costume: Zannatul Nayem
Art Director: Babu Shawpnowala
Art Associate: Nisith Shamim
Make-up: Shafiqur Rahman
Still Photography: Al Shahriar

প্রোডাকশন ডিজাইনঃ রায়হান আসাদ
প্রাথমিক সম্পাদনাঃ মোঃ সাব্বির আহমেদ, সাকিল হোসেন
রূপসজ্জা সহকারীঃ মনোয়ার হোসেন
ক্যামেরা সরবরাহঃ ফাইভ স্টার ক্যামেরা হাইজ
প্রধান সহকারী চিত্রগ্রাহকঃ সজল আহমেদ
সহকারী চিত্রগ্রাহকঃ লতিফুর রহমান, হাসান আলী
শব্দ গ্রহনঃ মোঃ ইমরান
লাইট সরবরাহঃ খলিল লাইট হাউজ
আলোকসজ্জা প্রধানঃ লিয়াকত আলী
আলোকসজ্জা সহকারীঃ জসিম, কায়সার আলী, মোঃ আতিক
ব্যবস্থাপনা প্রধানঃ জুয়েল আহমেদ
ব্যবস্থাপনা সহকারীঃ তানভীর, রাজিব, জিয়া
খাবার সরবরাহঃ হান্নান (উওরা)
গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ আলতাফ হোসেন
পিক-আপঃ জামাল হোসেন
ঘোড়ার গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ সিদ্দিকুর রহমান
তালাচাবির দোকানঃ ইউসুফ আলি
লোকেশনঃ হইচই শুটিং হাউজ ( উত্তরা ), উত্তরা খালপার ( দিয়াবাড়ী )
কারিগরী সহযোগীতাঃ টেলিহোম

তালাচাবি নাটক —
Label: Eagle Music™

Talachabi Drama © 2021 Eagle Music
#TalachabiNatok #Natok2021 #NewNatok2021

Tala cabi Cast: Afran Nisho, Mehazabien Chowdhury, Kachi Khondoker, Shilpi sharkar Apu & Iktarul Islam.

তালা চাবি নাটক এর অন্যান্য চরিত্রেঃ আয়ান আহমীর সুজন, রাফায়াতুল্লা সোহান, উদয় খান, তাকবিরুল ইসলাম ও সুমগ্ন সৌরভ
Cinematographer: Zahid Hossain
Title, Edit & Color: Tanvir Tahsan
Background Score: Apple Mahmud Emil
Chief Ad: Rayhan Asad, Hasib Rahman
Ad: Rijuan Alom Akib,rajon Monrai
Costume: Zannatul Nayem
Art Director: Babu Shawpnowala
Art Associate: Nisith Shamim
Make-up: Shafiqur Rahman
Still Photography: Al Shahriar

প্রোডাকশন ডিজাইনঃ রায়হান আসাদ
প্রাথমিক সম্পাদনাঃ মোঃ সাব্বির আহমেদ, সাকিল হোসেন
রূপসজ্জা সহকারীঃ মনোয়ার হোসেন
ক্যামেরা সরবরাহঃ ফাইভ স্টার ক্যামেরা হাইজ
প্রধান সহকারী চিত্রগ্রাহকঃ সজল আহমেদ
সহকারী চিত্রগ্রাহকঃ লতিফুর রহমান, হাসান আলী
শব্দ গ্রহনঃ মোঃ ইমরান
লাইট সরবরাহঃ খলিল লাইট হাউজ
আলোকসজ্জা প্রধানঃ লিয়াকত আলী
আলোকসজ্জা সহকারীঃ জসিম, কায়সার আলী, মোঃ আতিক
ব্যবস্থাপনা প্রধানঃ জুয়েল আহমেদ
ব্যবস্থাপনা সহকারীঃ তানভীর, রাজিব, জিয়া
খাবার সরবরাহঃ হান্নান (উওরা)
গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ আলতাফ হোসেন
পিক-আপঃ জামাল হোসেন
ঘোড়ার গাড়ি সরবরাহঃ সিদ্দিকুর রহমান
তালাচাবির দোকানঃ ইউসুফ আলি
লোকেশনঃ হইচই শুটিং হাউজ ( উত্তরা ), উত্তরা খালপার ( দিয়াবাড়ী )
